Surrogate key derived from assessment_type, title, subject_area, scope, module_code, and grade_level_tested. Primary key.
Source system category: illuminate (internal KIPP), state (NJSLA, FAST, NJGPA), or college (SAT, ACT, PSAT, AP).
Display name of the assessment.
Subject tested (e.g., Mathematics, English Language Arts, Reading, Science, Composite).
Assessment scope or family (e.g., CMA, CGI for internal; NJSLA, FAST for state; SAT, ACT for college).
Module or test code that identifies the specific assessment variant (e.g., QA1, ELA05, act_composite, sat_total_score).
Module type for internal Illuminate assessments (e.g., QA, CR). Null for state and college assessments.
Grade level the assessment targets. Null for college-entrance assessments which are not grade-specific.
TRUE for KIPP-created internal assessments administered via Illuminate. FALSE for external state and college assessments.
Determines how scores link to students: enrollment (scores are tied to a section enrollment) or student (scores follow the student with no enrollment context, e.g., SAT, ACT, AP).
Surrogate key derived from powerschool_student_number, assessment_id, and administered_at. Primary key.
FK to dim_assessments. Derived from assessment_type, title, subject_area, scope, module_code, and grade_level_id.
FK to dim_terms. Derived from reporting term type, code, name, start_date, region, and school_id. Null when the administration date does not fall within any reporting term.
PowerSchool student number.
Illuminate assessment ID.
Academic year of the expected assessment.

Subject area of the assessment.
Assessment scope (e.g., CMA, CGI).
Module type (e.g., QA, CR).
Module code identifying the assessment variant.
Grade level ID the assessment targets.
PowerSchool school ID where the student is enrolled.
Network region (Newark, Camden, Miami, Paterson).
Always TRUE for this model, which only includes internal Illuminate assessments.
Surrogate key. Primary key for this fact table.
FK to dim_assessments.
FK to dim_students. Derived from student_number, falling back to state_student_id for FL state assessments where student_number is null. FL fallback keys do not resolve in dim_students (#3626).
FK to dim_dates. The date the assessment was taken.
PowerSchool student number. Null for FL state assessments that only carry a state student ID.
Academic year the assessment was administered.
Display name of the assessment.
Assessment scope or discipline.
Subject tested.
Module or test code for the specific assessment variant.
Network region or season identifier.
Date the assessment was taken. Null for state assessments where only the administration window is recorded.
Scale score achieved. Null for internal assessments that use percent correct instead.
Percent of questions answered correctly. Null for state assessments.
Proficiency band label (e.g., performance band for internal, achievement level for state).
Growth percentile where available. Currently null; reserved for future enrichment.
TRUE if the student met the mastery or proficiency threshold for this assessment.
Source system: internal, state_nj, or state_fl.
Surrogate key. Primary key for this fact table.
FK to dim_students. Derived from student_number.
FK to dim_assessments.
FK to dim_dates. The date the assessment was taken. Null for AP exams where only the academic year is recorded.
PowerSchool student number.
Academic year the assessment was administered.
Assessment family (SAT, ACT, PSAT, AP).
Subject or section tested (e.g., Math, Reading, Composite, Combined, or AP subject name).
Specific score variant (e.g., act_composite, sat_total_score, sat_ebrw, or AP course subject code).
Scale score achieved on this test section. For AP exams, the exam grade (1-5).
Percent correct where available. Null for most college assessments.
Administration round label. Null for AP exams.
Course discipline alignment (e.g., ENG, MATH). Null for AP exams.
Official or Practice.
Row number ranking by highest score within student x score_type (college) or student x AP course (AP). 1 = best score.
Highest scale score for this student x score_type across all administrations. Null for AP.
Best combined score across test sections and administrations. Null for AP.
Running maximum scale score up to this test date. Null for AP.
Standardized subject area for cross-test comparison (e.g., Total, Math, EBRW/Reading). Null for AP.
Aligned subject for grouping across SAT and ACT. Null for AP.
Proficiency classification. For AP: Qualified (score >= 3) or Not Qualified. Null for college-entrance assessments.
Source system: college (SAT/ACT/PSAT) or ap.
Surrogate key derived from region and commlog_reason. Primary key for this dimension.
KIPP region code (kippmiami, kippnewark, kippcamden) that this intervention threshold applies to.
DeansList comm log reason value that maps to this intervention type (e.g., 'Chronic Absence: 4').
Number of unexcused absences at which this intervention is triggered. Extracted from the numeric portion of commlog_reason.
Surrogate key derived from student_number, _dbt_source_relation, and calendardate. Primary key for this fact.
FK to dim_student_enrollments. Surrogate key derived from student_number, _dbt_source_relation, academic_year, and entrydate.
Calendar date of the attendance record. FK to dim_dates. Also used with location_key to join dim_school_calendars.
FK to dim_locations. Surrogate key derived from location_clean_name. Used with date_key to join dim_school_calendars.
PowerSchool student number. Degenerate dimension for filtering.
KIPP academic year (July start) in which this attendance date falls.
PowerSchool attendance code (e.g., A, T, T10, AD, OS, ISS). Null when present with no code recorded.
PowerSchool attendance value. 1.0 = present, 0.0 = absent.
PowerSchool membership value. Indicates whether the student was counted as a member on this day.
1.0 if the student was absent, 0.0 if present. Derived as abs(attendancevalue - 1).
Weighted presence value. 0.67 for tardy (T-prefix codes), otherwise equals attendancevalue.
1.0 if the student was tardy (T-prefix attendance code), 0.0 otherwise.
1.0 if the student arrived on time (non-tardy), 0.0 if tardy.
1.0 if the student received out-of-school suspension on this date (OS, OSS, OSSP, SHI codes).
1.0 if the student received in-school suspension on this date (S, ISS codes).
1.0 if the student was suspended (any type) on this date. Union of is_oss and is_iss codes.
TRUE if the student meets regional truancy criteria. Miami: 15+ absences in 90-day rolling window. NJ regions: projected absences reach 50+ for the year.
Semester code for the attendance date (e.g., S1, S2).
Term code for the attendance date (e.g., Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4).
Surrogate key derived from student_number, academic_year, and commlog_reason. Primary key for this fact.
FK to dim_student_enrollments. Surrogate key derived from student_number, _dbt_source_relation, academic_year, and entrydate.
FK to dim_student_attendance_intervention_types. Surrogate key derived from region and commlog_reason.
Date the communication was logged. FK to dim_dates. Null when the intervention is missing (not yet completed).
PowerSchool student number. Degenerate dimension for filtering.
KIPP academic year (July start) for this intervention record.
DeansList comm log reason value matching the intervention type (e.g., 'Chronic Absence: 4').
Number of unexcused absences that triggered this intervention.
Student's year-to-date unexcused absence count at the time of evaluation.
Free-text response notes from the communication log entry.
Topic selected for the communication log entry.
Date the communication was logged in DeansList. Null when the intervention is missing.
Status of the communication (e.g., Completed, Attempted).
Type of communication (e.g., Phone Call, Home Visit, IP).
Full name of the staff member who logged the communication.
Whether the intervention is 'Complete' (communication logged) or 'Missing' (no matching communication found).
Integer encoding of intervention_status. 1 = Complete, 0 = Missing. Used for aggregation.
TRUE if the student is currently enrolled in the Attendance Exceptions special program, exempting them from chronic absence tracking.
Surrogate key derived from streak_id and _dbt_source_relation. Primary key for this fact.
FK to dim_student_enrollments. Surrogate key derived from student_number, _dbt_source_relation, academic_year, and entrydate.
First date of the streak. FK to dim_dates (role-playing as streak start date).
Last date of the streak. FK to dim_dates (role-playing as streak end date).
PowerSchool student number. Degenerate dimension for filtering.
KIPP academic year (July start) derived from yearid + 1990.
Attendance code or attendancevalue string that defines the streak (e.g., 'A' for absent, 'P' for present, '1.0' for present-value streaks).
First calendar date of the streak.
Last calendar date of the streak.
Number of membership days in the streak (count of school days).
Number of calendar days in the streak (end_date - start_date + 1), including weekends and holidays.
Surrogate key derived from incident_id, incident_penalty_id, and _dbt_source_relation. Primary key for this fact.
FK to fct_behavioral_incidents. Surrogate key derived from incident_id and _dbt_source_relation.
Start date of the consequence. FK to dim_dates (role-playing as consequence start date). Null if not recorded.
End date of the consequence. FK to dim_dates (role-playing as consequence end date). Null if not recorded.

DeansList unique identifier for this specific consequence record.
Name of the consequence/penalty assigned (e.g., Out of School Suspension, In School Suspension, Detention).
Normalized suspension type code (OSS or ISS). Null for non-suspension consequences.
Number of days assigned for this consequence. May be fractional for partial-day consequences.
Number of class periods assigned for this consequence. Null when measured in days instead.
TRUE if this consequence is classified as a suspension in DeansList.
TRUE if this consequence is flagged as reportable for state reporting.
Start date of the consequence period.
End date of the consequence period.
Surrogate key derived from incident_id and _dbt_source_relation. Primary key for this fact.

Category assigned to the incident in DeansList.
Tier code from DeansList (T1, T2, T3, SW, TX, etc.).
Specific infraction description recorded in DeansList.
Physical location within the school where the incident occurred.
Context or setting of the incident (e.g., classroom, hallway).
Current workflow status of the incident in DeansList.
Normalized severity tier (Low, Middle, High, Social Work, Non-Behavioral, Other). Derived from category_tier with region-specific mappings.
Last, First name of the staff member who created the incident.
DeansList user identifier of the staff member who created the incident.
TRUE if the incident is flagged as a referral in DeansList.
TRUE if the incident is currently active (not archived/closed).
Date the incident was created, cast from create_ts_date.
Date the incident was closed. Null if still open.
Date the student is expected to return. Null if not applicable.
Surrogate key derived from record_id and _dbt_source_relation. Primary key for this fact.
FK to dim_student_enrollments. Surrogate key derived from student_number, _dbt_source_relation, academic_year, and entrydate.

PowerSchool student number. Degenerate dimension for filtering.
KIPP academic year (July start) for this communication.
DeansList unique identifier for the communication log entry.
Method of communication (e.g., Phone Call, Home Visit, Text, Email).
Topic selected for the communication.
Reason category for the communication (e.g., 'Att: Absent', 'Chronic Absence: 4', general reasons).
Status of the communication attempt (e.g., Completed, Attempted, Left Message).
Free-text response notes from the communication.
Full name of the staff member who logged the communication.
Date the communication was logged.
Datetime the communication was logged, preserving time of day.

Surrogate primary key derived from student_number and college_code_branch. Generated with generate_surrogate_key(["student_number", "college_code_branch"]).
Surrogate key derived from student_number. FK to dim_students.
Surrogate key derived from college_code_branch. FK to dim_colleges.
Earliest enrollment_begin date across all NSC records for this student x college combination. FK to dim_dates (role-playing as enrollment start date).
Latest enrollment_end date across all NSC records for this student x college combination. FK to dim_dates (role-playing as enrollment end date).
KIPP student identifier from the kippadb roster, joining NSC contact records to PowerSchool students.
NSC college code including branch suffix. Natural identifier for the college in this enrollment record.
Latest NSC enrollment status code for this student x college tenure (e.g., "F" = full-time, "H" = half-time, "W" = withdrawn, "G" = graduated).
Two-year or four-year classification of the degree being pursued, derived from the latest NSC enrollment record for this tenure.
Title of the degree awarded or in progress as reported in the latest NSC enrollment record (e.g., "Bachelor of Arts").
Primary academic major as reported in the latest NSC enrollment record for this student x college tenure.
Class level of the student at the college in the latest NSC enrollment record (e.g., "Freshman", "Sophomore").
TRUE if any NSC enrollment record for this student x college combination includes a graduated flag of "Y".
TRUE if any NSC enrollment record for this student x college combination includes an enrollment status of "W" (withdrawn).
Surrogate primary key derived from college_code_branch. Generated with generate_surrogate_key(["college_code_branch"]).
NSC college code including branch suffix. Natural identifier used to join NSC enrollment records and the NSC–Salesforce crosswalk.
College name as reported by NSC, deduplicated to the most recent value.
Two-letter state abbreviation for the college as reported by NSC.
NSC classification of the college as a two-year or four-year institution (e.g., "2-year", "4-year").
National Center for Education Statistics (NCES) identifier from the NSC crosswalk. Null when the college is not mapped in the crosswalk.
TRUE if the college meets 100% of demonstrated financial need for admitted students, per the NSC crosswalk.
TRUE if the college is considered a strong out-of-state option for KIPP students, per the NSC crosswalk.
Selectivity tier of the college from the Salesforce account competitiveness_ranking field (e.g., "Most Selective", "Selective").
Salesforce account type for the college (e.g., "4-year College/University", "2-year Community College").
TRUE if the college is a Historically Black College or University, per the Salesforce account record.

PowerSchool student number. Degenerate dimension for filtering.
KIPP academic year (July start) in which this assignment falls.
Name of the assignment as entered in the PowerSchool gradebook.

Short code for the gradebook category.

Score as a percentage (0-100). For POINTS type this is (scorepoints / totalpointvalue) * 100; for PERCENT type this equals the entered value.

TRUE if the assignment is flagged as exempt (not counted).

TRUE if this assignment contributes to the final grade calculation.

Surrogate primary key derived from ticket id. Generated with generate_surrogate_key(["t.id"]).
Foreign key to dim_staff for the ticket submitter. Surrogate key derived from submitter employee_number.
Foreign key to dim_staff for the current ticket assignee. Surrogate key derived from assignee employee_number. Nullable — unassigned tickets have no assignee.
Foreign key to dim_staff for the original assignee at ticket creation. Surrogate key derived from original assignee employee_number. Nullable — not all tickets have a creation-time assignee.
Foreign key to dim_locations. Surrogate key derived from the Location custom field value on the ticket.
Foreign key to dim_dates for the date the ticket was created. Matches dim_dates.date_key.
Foreign key to dim_dates for the date the ticket was solved. Matches dim_dates.date_key. Nullable — open or pending tickets have no solved date.
Zendesk numeric ticket identifier.
Current Zendesk ticket status (new, open, pending, hold, solved, closed). Deleted tickets are excluded.
Subject line of the ticket as entered by the submitter.
Ticket category from the Zendesk custom Category field (e.g., Hardware, Software, Access).
Technology tier classification from the Zendesk custom Tech Tier field, indicating complexity or routing level.
Location value from the Zendesk custom Location field on the ticket.
Total number of public replies on the ticket from ticket_metrics.
Total time to full resolution in business-hours minutes (full_resolution_time_in_minutes.business from ticket_metrics).
Time to first reply in business-hours minutes (reply_time_in_minutes.business from ticket_metrics).
Number of times the ticket was assigned to a different agent.
Number of times the ticket was assigned to a different group.
Calendar date the ticket was created.
Timestamp when the ticket was created in Zendesk.
Timestamp when the ticket was first assigned to an agent.
Timestamp when the ticket assignee was last updated.

TRUE if the student has a non-null gifted_and_talented value in PowerSchool, indicating gifted and talented identification.
TRUE if the student has a non-null lep_status, indicating active English Language Learner classification.
TRUE if the student's iep_status is 'With IEP'.
Student race/ethnicity mapped to standard category labels from PowerSchool single-character codes.
Surrogate key derived from survey_id and question_shortname. Primary key for this bridge.
FK to dim_surveys. Surrogate key derived from survey_id.
FK to dim_survey_questions. Surrogate key derived from question_shortname.
Source system identifier for the survey instrument.
Abbreviated identifier for the question within this survey context (e.g., scd_01, Q_1, SF1).
TRUE if the question is required for survey completion. From Google Forms question_required flag; always true for SCD scale items.
Surrogate key derived from survey_id and term composite fields. Primary key for this dimension.
FK to dim_surveys. Surrogate key derived from survey_id.
FK to dim_terms. Surrogate key derived from term composite fields (type, code, name, start_date, region, school_id).
Source system identifier for the survey instrument.
Display name of the survey instrument for this administration.
Short code for the administration period (e.g., SCD, MGR1, SUP1).
Display name for the administration period from reporting terms.
Academic year this administration falls within.
Current status of the administration window: open (currently accepting responses), closed (past deadline), or upcoming (not yet started).
Last date responses are accepted, derived from the term end date.
Surrogate key derived from survey_administration_key, respondent_population, and the three respondent FK columns. Primary key for this dimension.
FK to dim_survey_administrations. Identifies which survey administration this expectation belongs to.
Discriminator for respondent type: staff, student, or family. Determines which respondent FK is populated.
FK to dim_staff. Populated when respondent_population is staff. Null for student and family respondents.
FK to dim_student_enrollments. Populated when respondent_population is student. Null for staff and family respondents.
FK to dim_student_contact_persons. Populated when respondent_population is family. Null for staff and student respondents.
Surrogate key derived from question_shortname. Primary key for this dimension. Generated with generate_surrogate_key(["question_shortname"]).
Abbreviated identifier for the question, used as the unique grain. Derived from item_abbreviation for Google Forms or question_code for SCD. Examples: scd_01, Q_1, regional_data_1, SF1.
Full text of the survey question as presented to respondents.
Type of question (e.g., SCALE, TEXT, RADIO, CHECKBOX, Row). Google Forms question_kind for form-based questions, SCALE for SCD scale items.
Surrogate key derived from survey_id. Primary key for the survey dimension. Generated with generate_surrogate_key(["survey_id"]).
Source system identifier for the survey. Google Forms form_id, Alchemer survey_id (cast to string), or synthetic ID for archived and PowerSchool sources.
Display name of the survey instrument (e.g., School Community Diagnostic Staff Survey, Manager Survey).
Classification of the survey instrument (e.g., School Community Diagnostic, Manager Survey, Support Survey, Climate Survey).
Broad domain the survey measures (e.g., School Culture, Staff Experience, Staff Retention, College & Career). Nullable for uncategorized surveys.
Source platform the survey is administered on (Google Forms, Alchemer, or PowerSchool).
Surrogate key derived from survey_id, survey_response_id, respondent_identifier, and question_shortname. Primary key for this fact.
FK to fct_survey_submissions. Links this response to its parent submission record.
FK to dim_survey_questions. Identifies which question this response answers.
Source system identifier for the survey instrument.
Source system identifier for the individual survey response.
Abbreviated identifier for the question being answered. Matches the grain of dim_survey_questions.
Numeric value of the response, when applicable. Null for open-ended text responses. Cast from the raw answer text.
Raw text of the response as submitted by the respondent.
Surrogate key derived from survey_id, survey_response_id, and respondent identifier. Primary key for this fact.
FK to dim_survey_administrations. Identifies which survey administration this submission belongs to.
FK to dim_dates (role-playing as submission date). The local date the survey was submitted.
Discriminator for respondent type: staff, student, or family. Determines which respondent FK is populated.
FK to dim_staff for the respondent. Populated when respondent_population is staff. Null for student and family.
FK to dim_student_enrollments for the respondent. Populated when respondent_population is student. Null for staff and family.
FK to dim_student_contact_persons for the respondent. Populated when respondent_population is family. Null for staff and student.

Role-playing FK to dim_staff for the subject being evaluated. Populated only for Manager Survey submissions where the respondent (direct report) evaluates their manager (subject). Null for all other survey types.
Source system identifier for the survey instrument.
Source system identifier for the individual survey response.
UTC timestamp when the survey response was submitted.
Academic year this submission falls within.
